stemHtml: A microburst is experienced when an aircraft is on final approach. What will it experience? Initially…

options.a: The airspeed will increase and the aeroplane will fly above the glide slope.
options.b: The airspeed will decrease and the aeroplane will fly above the glide slope.
options.c: The airspeed will decrease and the aeroplane will fly below the glide slope.
options.d: The airspeed will increase and the aeroplane will fly below the glide slope.
